creator: moncrg@dominus.ma.ultranet.com
text:
boot(8) refers to several files, including kernel.config, which
specifically is missing.  I didn't check on the others. I know
a new bootstrap is in progress, which may make obsolete this...

I however saw reference to this in c.u.b.f.m, and a search on
man pages [2.2.7 & 3.0] as well as gnat, FAQ and Handbook 
didn't show it

Fix: 

add this missing man page, or delete the reference in boot(8),
whichever is more appropriate
